pages.title: The Three-Block System
pages.text: PreFabs don't work alone - they're part of a three-block system:$(br2)$(li)$(bold)PreFab Block$() (Overworld) $(li)Routes resources between dimensions $(li)Controls state machine $(li)No internal storage$(br2)$(li)$(bold)Importer Block$() (CM Dimension) $(li)Input gate where resources enter factory $(li)Has small buffer (9 slots) $(li)Actively pushes items into adjacent inventories$(br2)$(li)$(bold)Exporter Block$() (CM Dimension) $(li)Output gate where resources exit factory $(li)Has small buffer (9 slots) $(li)Actively pulls from adjacent inventories$(br2)Tip: $(bold)Best practice$(): Use intermediate chests between gates and machines for more reliable systems

pages.title: Resource Flow: PULL Mode
pages.text: Overworld Chest       ↓ (PreFab extracts via IItemHandler) PreFab PULL Face       ↓ (Transport across dimension) Importer Block (CM dimension)       ↓ (Importer pushes via IItemHandler) Intermediate Chest (CM dimension)       ↓ (Hopper/Pipe pulls from chest) Furnace Input Slot

pages.title: Resource Flow: PUSH Mode
pages.text: Furnace Output Slot       ↓ (Hopper/Pipe pushes to chest) Intermediate Chest (CM dimension)       ↓ (Exporter pulls via IItemHandler) Exporter Block (CM dimension)       ↓ (Transport across dimension) PreFab PUSH Face       ↓ (PreFab inserts via IItemHandler) Overworld Chest
